_readme: Single source of truth for all site content. Fields set to null are PLACEHOLDERS — they are not stated in the client's app-requirements documents (brochure + business card) and render as a visible 'Untitled' marker in the UI. Fill them in with real, client-confirmed content before launch. Do NOT invent copy here.

hero.headline: Caring Heart Assisted Living
hero.ctaNote: Call or email us to learn more about care and visiting hours

mission.statement: To provide a safe, nurturing, and home-like environment where elderly clients over 55 can thrive. We offer personalized care plans tailored to physical, emotional, social, and spiritual needs, ensuring every resident feels respected, supported, and genuinely at home.
mission.differentiatorsBody: Unlike traditional facilities, we focus on creating a family-like environment with one-on-one care. Our experienced staff (10+ years) provide customized care plans, meaningful daily activities, and work closely with families to support the best outcomes for each resident. We ensure residents receive care with dignity, empathy, and professionalism.

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: Personalized support, meals, transportation, and daily care for each resident.

items.label: Private rooms
items.desc: Private rooms for resident comfort and privacy.

facilities.heading: Facilities & Amenities
facilities.intro: A small home with shared spaces, technology access, and safety features for up to 5 residents.

items.label: Capacity for 5 residents
items.desc: Comfortable capacity for up to 5 residents.

items.label: Garden, common lounge, and activity room
items.desc: Garden, common lounge, and activity room available.

items.label: Wi-Fi, TV, and technology access
items.desc: Wi-Fi, TV, and technology access in the home.

items.label: Fire alarms, emergency exits, and storm shelter in the basement
items.desc: Fire alarms, emergency exits, and a storm shelter in the basement.

gallery.heading: Our Home
gallery.intro: A look inside the home and the exterior of the property.

owner.heading: Meet the Founder
owner.name: Seray Lansana
owner.title: Founder & Compassionate Nurse
owner.quote: With over 15 years of experience in nursing homes, I found joy and fulfillment in providing care to elderly clients. Witnessing the appreciation from my patients and knowing I made a difference in their lives inspired me to open Caring Heart Assisted Living. I am a compassionate nurse, dedicated to delivering holistic, heartfelt care.
owner.photoAlt: Seray Lansana, Founder of Caring Heart Assisted Living

staffSafety.heading: Our Staff & Safety
staffSafety.intro: A 5:2 resident-to-staff ratio with trained caregivers available 24/7.

dayInLife.heading: A Day in the Life
dayInLife.intro: Residents receive help with daily activities, time outdoors, music, and meals as needed.

items.label: All meals and personal care, as needed

cards.title: Holidays & Celebrations
cards.body: We celebrate holidays, birthdays, and Thanksgiving with residents and their families.

cards.title: Spiritual & Cultural Respect
cards.body: Spiritual, religious, and cultural needs are honored daily.

cards.title: Visiting Hours
cards.body: Visitors are welcome from 8:00 am to 8:00 pm.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Call, email, or visit during daily hours to learn more.
